workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.desc: Select a floor range, generate a summary, confirm to inject.
workspace.rangeHint: “Floor” here just means message order: the first message is 1, the second is 2. Default batch size only affects how many messages the auto-fill action picks at once.
workspace.filterFragmentsPlaceholder:
One keyword or fragment per line.
e.g.: think
comment
<!--img-prompt
workspace.filterHint: One keyword per line. 'think' removes <think>...</think> blocks; 'comment' removes HTML comments; exact fragments are deleted as-is.
workspace.noDraft: No pending summary. Confirmed summaries appear in the Summary tab.
segments.title: Summaries
segments.desc: Confirmed summaries accumulate here. The full text is used for injection.
segments.fusionRecoveryHint: If merge returns empty content, Memoir retries with reinforced recovery prompts. If it still returns empty, the original summaries are preserved as text for manual revision.
settings.title: Settings
settings.responseLengthHint: 0 = follow SillyTavern's global response length. This only limits one model reply, not the total confirmed summary size.
settings.contentCompatibilityEnable: Enable mature content archive compatibility patch
settings.contentCompatibilityHint: Enabled by default. Converts high-intensity mature, violent, biological, or taboo fiction into neutral archive records to reduce empty responses. Turning it off only affects the first normal request; empty-response recovery still enables the compatibility prompt temporarily.
inject.title: Injection Strategy
inject.strategyDesc: Decides which prompt layer the summary enters and its relative position within that layer. This is not an absolute insertion point.
inject.enableDesc: When enabled, confirmed summary text is automatically injected into the conversation context.
inject.positionBeforeHint: Placed before all prompts, with the lowest presence.
inject.positionAfterHint: Placed near the character definition, usually more stable.
inject.positionChatHint: Inserted into the chat injection layer and ordered alongside other modules in that layer.
inject.depthDesc: Only applies to the chat injection layer. 0 = tries to stay close to the latest message; prompts at the same depth still follow SillyTavern ordering, so this is not guaranteed to be absolutely last. Larger values move it further forward.
inject.wrapTagDesc: If set, injected content is wrapped in <tagname>...</tagname>. Some models pay extra attention to specific tags like paststory or context. Leave empty for no wrapping.
inject.attentionNote: Tip: Closer to the latest message = higher AI attention. For long-chat story summaries, try 'Character Definition' or 'Inside Chat, depth 1-4' with a wrapper tag for best results.
settings.promptHintNewUser: Tip: Start by picking a preset and templates. Only expand to edit the full prompts if you know what to change.
settings.promptVariableHint: Tip: You can paste in your own preferred summary prompt template here. The system prompt has no required variables; in the user template, keep {{start_floor}}, {{end_floor}}, and {{chat_history}}, and you can change the rest.
settings.fusionHint: Fusion has its own prompts, separate from main summarization.
token.counterUnavailable: No token counting interface is available in this SillyTavern build.
token.counterReady: Counts the current cumulative summary text only, without injection wrappers.
toast.invalidRange: Please enter a valid floor range.
toast.promptBuiltInNoOverwrite: Built-in presets cannot be overwritten. Use 'Save As'.
toast.contentCompatibilitySaved: Mature content archive compatibility patch saved.
toast.contentCompatibilityReset: Restored mature content archive compatibility default prompt.
toast.fusionFallbackUsed: Fusion API still returned empty content. Original summaries were preserved as text for manual revision.
toast.confirmClearAll: Clear all summaries? Injection content will also be cleared.
promptNote.builtInDirty: This is a built-in preset. Edits can't overwrite it — use 'Save As'.
promptNote.builtInClean: This is a built-in preset. Edit, then 'Save As' to keep changes.
promptNote.customDirty: Unsaved edits detected. Please 'Save' or 'Save As'.
promptNote.customClean: Custom preset — edits can be saved directly.
promptNote.discardConfirm: Unsaved edits will be lost. Switch anyway?
launcher.title: Open Memoir
